series_metadata.series_description: Records inlucd Final National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System Permits

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Keep permit expiration or facility closure unless a licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division. In which case, keep 2 years add administrative, civil, or criminal action is complete. ; Electronic: Keep permit expiration or facility closure unless a licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division. In which case, keep 2 years add administrative, civil, or criminal action is complete
